title: zombie+
description: adds new zombie variants to your game
body:
This mod adds two new variations of the zombie to try and make the world a little more feel more diverse and organic (More is on the way!)

**4 new zombie variants + skeleton variant:**
- Cold Zombie: spawns in cold biomes, inflicts slowness on hit

- Cold Zombie Horse: has a chance to spawn in cold biomes with a cold zombie on it's back with a spear

- Jungle Zombie: spawns in jungle and sparse jungle inflicts poison on hit (also dies faster to sunlight so Im not torturing you too much)

- Cave Zombie: spwans under Y level 0, 2.5 blocks tall, always holds either a stone or an iron pickaxe.

- Deep Cave Zombie: has a chance to spawn under Y level -40, full iron armor + pickaxe; extremely strong

- Swamp Zombie: spawns in swamps, has a poison cloud effect on death

- Soul Skeleton: spawns in soul sand valley

<details>
<summary>Zombie items:</summary>


- Cold Rotten Flesh: gives slowness and hunger, extinguishes fire (if the player is burning)- can be brewed into 'potion of freezing'

- Poison Rotten Flesh: gives poison and hunger, can be brewed into 'potion of venom'

</details> 


<details>
<summary>Soul Skeleton:</summary>

- Decayed Bone: drops from a soul skeleton

- Soul Bone Meal: craftable from a decayed bone, has a chance to grow nether warts on soul sand in the nether

- Soul Sand Dust: drops from a soul skeleton > crafts into soul sand/soil. used to activate a soul skeleton skull

- Soul Skeleton Skull: rare chance to drop from a soul skeleton. placed on the ground and activated with soul sand dust+right click > will emit particles, any fire lit around it will turn blue

- Soul Fire Charge: craftable from fire charge + soul sand dust > lights a blue fire
</details>



<details>
<summary>Blades:</summary>

- Venom Blade: trimmable on diamond sword with undead trim and poison rotten flesh. has baseline 25% chance to inflict poison I

- Glacial Blade: trimmable on diamond sword with undead trim and cold rotten flesh. has baseline 25% chance to inflict slowness I

- Decay Blade: trimmable on diamond sword with undead trim and decayed bone. has baseline 25% chance to inflict wither I
</details>



<details>
<summary>Special Items:</summary>

**-Undead Trim:** found in several structures, currently appliable only on swords

**-Soul Fire Quiver:** craftable from soul skeleton skull + blaze rod + soul sand dust. hold in offhand and shot an arrow from a bow/crossbow > will shoot a "soul arrow" that deals more damage and fire. has 32 durability
</details>




<details>
<summary> 2 enchantments: </summary>
**-Potency:** makes the Blades inflict their effects on level II instead of I


**-Affliction:** each level adds +15% to effect inflicting for the Blades; 3 levels  
</details>
